title: Performance KAM Analyst
description:
**Descripción de la empresa**  

Pedidosya es parte de Delivery Hero, compañía líder mundial en delivery que opera en más de 70 países en todo el mundo. PedidosYa es la compañía de tecnología líder en delivery y quick commerce de Latinoamérica. Es una plataforma simple, rápida y accesible que conecta a una red de millones de personas usuarias, comercios y personas repartidoras a una gran variedad de productos y servicios que ofrece la comunidad. La compañía, que opera en 15 países de Latinoamérica lanzó en 2020 PedidosYa Market, el primer mercado 100% digital que entrega alimentos y artículos para el hogar desde los 10 minutos tras haber realizado el pedido. Delivery Hero cotiza en la Bolsa de Frankfurt desde 2017 y forma parte del índice bursátil MDAX.

 **Descripción del empleo*** Ser referente de las problemáticas de nuestros partners, realizando todo lo posible para mejorar la calidad de sus servicios y la experiencia final de todos nuestros usuarios.
* Tener un contacto fluído a key partners para brindar apoyo y seguimiento.
* Mantener comunicaciones efectivas con los referentes operativos de cada partner para armar y ejecutar planes de acción concretos que afecten su operatoria diaria interna y con PEYA
* Detectar y comunicar desvíos mediante la generación y seguimiento de reportes.
* Analizar de forma integral la operación, sacar conclusiones de los datos y formular hipótesis.
* Diseñar y ejecutar mejoras/proyectos internos y cross funcionales para la correcta performance de nuestros partners.
* Tomar la iniciativa de experimentar un ritmo rápido de testeos de nuevas prácticas/features.
* Visitar a los locales para detectar oportunidades de mejora y transmitir buenas prácticas
* Responsable de la comunicación con equipos internos de PedidosYa

 **Requisitos*** Graduadas/os y/o estudiantes avanzadas/os en carreras de Ingeniería Industrial, Ciencias Económicas y/o carreras afines.
* Contar con al menos un año en posiciones similares de trabajo de seguimiento y contacto con cartera de clientes.
* Contar con al menos un año en posiciones similares de análisis operacional con manejo de grandes volúmenes de datos y gestión de proyectos.
* Experiencia gestionando proyectos con distintas metodologías.
* Conocimientos de Business Intelligence y SQL ( Tableau, Looker, PowerBI)

 **Información adicional**  

La diversidad de talento potencia nuestra Cooltura y nuestra organización. Jugamos en equipo en todo lo que hacemos, y lo que más nos gusta de eso es que promovemos la creación de equipos diversos e inclusivos que puedan aportar diferentes perspectivas a PedidosYa. Nuestras oportunidades laborales están abiertas a todas las personas, independientemente de su identidad de género, orientación sexual, origen étnico, religión, edad, discapacidad y/o otras características individuales.  

  

En caso de necesitar algún ajuste razonable o accesibilidad particular para tener la entrevista, por favor no dejes de aclararlo en tu postulación. Además, siéntete libre de indicarnos tus pronombres (él/ella/elle) desde el primer contacto.  

  

\#CoolturaPeYa \#LaDiversidadNosPotencia

description:

title: MK Rio Grande - Seasonal Stock Associate
description:
Michael Kors is always interested in hearing from talented, globally\-minded individuals with a passion for fashion.
If you enjoy working in a creative, fast\-paced environment, then we would love to hear from you!
—
SEASONAL STOCK ASSOCIATE
THE OPPORTUNITY
Our contributors at Michael Kors are stylish individuals who are passionate about the customer experience and achieving
results. As a Stock Associate, you are a flexible team player with the ability to multitask and thrive in a fun, inspiring and
fast\-paced store environment.
WHAT YOU’LL DO:
• Keep selling floor and stock room neat, organized and stocked
• Maintain understanding and execute all shipping and receiving protocols and policies
• Demonstrate flexibility and perform store tasks with speed and excellence
• Consistently support selling team with business needs while prioritizing the customer experience
WE’D LOVE TO SEE:
• 1\+ year of relevant retail experience
• Energetic and motivated with the ability to drive results
• Customer service focused
• Technologically savvy, organized individual
THE BENEFITS
• Michael Kors employee discount
• Flexible schedule
• Eligible to participate in holiday selling contests and win prizes
REQUIREMENTS
• Proficiency in reading, speaking, and writing in English is required.
• Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in the United States. We are unable to sponsor or take
over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.
• Ability to meet store scheduling and availability expectations, including the ability to work a flexible schedule,
including weekends, holidays, and high retail traffic and sales days, including but not limited to the day after
Thanksgiving, Memorial Day, Christmas Eve, Mother’s Day, etc.
PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS:
The physical demands here are representative of those that must be met by an employee to successfully perform the
essential functions of this job. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to
perform these functions.
• Ability to stand and walk for extended periods (up to 8 hours per shift).
• Ability to lift and carry up to 30 pounds.
• Ability to reach overhead, bend, kneel, and stoop.
• Ability to handle merchandise and operate point\-of\-sale equipment.
• Ability to visually assess merchandise and customer needs.
• Ability to communicate clearly with customers and team members in both written and verbal formats.
• Ability to work in busy environments, including but not limited to working under bright lights, with music, and during
peak traffic hours.
Michael Kors is committed to providing reasonable accommodations to qualified individuals with disabilities.
—

title: Order To Cash - Cash App Intern
description:
**How will you CONTRIBUTE and GROW?**
-------------------------------------

The OTC Cash App Intern reports directly to the OTC Cash App Team Lead. The primary function and purpose of this position is to record payments received from clients in the United States, perform data entry on a daily basis in order to provide clear and up\-to\-date information to Client Account Agents, while promoting Air Liquide’s quality and security objectives.
**Job Responsibilities:**

**Application of cash receipts:**

**Examine exceptions for customer payments received not automatically applied by HighRadius (collection and cash application tool).**

**In the instance where HighRadius is not implemented yet, enters data related to the recording of payments received by check and applies them to client accounts in SAP.**

**If necessary, contacts clients or collectors to obtain missing information to apply payment against invoices.**

**Continuous Improvement:**

**Works closely with members of the Finance team and the Accounts Receivable team.**

**Find new ways to improve the efficiency of the process.**

**Safety/Quality:**

**Respects all Air Liquide safety policies, procedures and programs.**

**Participates in the promotion of Air Liquide's safety objectives. Knows and follows all procedures as outlined in Air Liquide's Quality Manual.**

**\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**
------------------------------------------

**Are you a MATCH?**
--------------------

**Qualifications:**

**Education:**

**Finance, Accounting, or Business Management student preferred.**

**Language Requirements:**

**English language proficiency is required. \[B2]**

**Knowledge and Skills:**

**Knowledge of SAP a plus.**

**Knowledge of HighRadius a plus.**

**Strong knowledge of Google Suites.**

**Oral and written communication skills.**

**Digital mindset for systems automation and connectivity .**

**Continuous improvement mindset for process improvements.**

**Our Differences make our Performance**

  

At Air Liquide, we are committed to build a diverse and inclusive workplace that embraces the diversity of our employees, our customers, patients, community stakeholders and cultures across the world.
  

  

We welcome and consider applications from all qualified applicants, regardless of their background. We strongly believe a diverse organization opens up opportunities for people to express their talent, both individually and collectively and it helps foster our ability to innovate by living our fundamentals, acting for our success and creating an engaging environment in a changing world.

title: Colorista
description:

title: Responsable de Calidad (Bahía Blanca)
description:
Nos encontramos en búsqueda de un Responsable de Calidad en la localidad de Bahía Blanca, provincia de Buenos Aires , quien tendrá como objetivos colaborar en el mantenimiento del Sistema de Gestión de Calidad, brindando soporte a las áreas involucradas sobre el uso de las herramientas de gestión y verificando el funcionamiento de los distintos procesos que están dentro del alcance del certificado ISO 9001:2015, así como otras certificaciones que la organización decida implementar.
  
Funciones Principales Controlar y gestionar, indicadores de gestión operativa de seguridad física y documentación asociada de calidad en la regional que le competa, con el fin de evidenciar que el proceso de prestación del servicio se encuentra controlado, conforme a lo establecido. Implementar y realizar el seguimiento de las herramientas del Sistema de Gestión con el objetivo de cumplimentar los procedimientos establecidos a nivel nacional e instructivos regionales. Ejecutar el plan de Auditorías Internas a los Servicio. Confeccionar informes de seguimiento sobre la gestión Operativa con el objetivo de medir el desempeño del proceso, para lograr se implementen las acciones correctivas sobre los desvíos detectados en el sistema. Brindar soporte y hacer el seguimiento de las herramientas del Sistema de Gestión tanto a sectores de apoyo como operativos. Asimismo, colaborar con el equipo de SGC Nacional en pos de la mejora continua y calidad de los procesos. Mantener actualizados los conocimientos de los requisitos normativos implementados por Securion que afectan al sector (ISO 9001:2015 Sistema de gestión de calidad, ISO 14001:2015 Sistema de gestión ambiental y cualquier otra norma que la compañía decida implementar a futuro). Ejecutar tareas relacionadas al mantenimiento del SGC. Acompañar y asesorar a los sectores operativos que reciban auditorías de clientes o que deban responder información de la compañía, dejando los debidos registros en el sistema.
  
  

¡Somos Securion! Brindamos servicios de seguridad en todo el país a medida de las necesidades de seguridad de cada cliente. Integramos vigilancia física con tecnología de última generación para ofrecer una cobertura total para cada industria.
  
  

Requisitos
  
  

Educación
  
Nivel Terciario o Universitario, en carreras de grado relacionadas o afines al área.
  
​​​​​​​ Formación
  
Auditor Interno según Norma ISO 9000:2015, e ISO 19011:2018\.
  
Manejo intermedio del paquete Office.
  
Conocimientos en Gestión Ambiental.
  
Conocimientos en Sistema de Gestión de Calidad.
  
Carnet de conducir.
  
Disponibilidad para viajar.
  
  

Beneficios
  
  

Salario acorde a la posición.
  
Medicina prepaga de primer nivel.
  
Paquete de beneficios Securion.

title: Trialing Associate
description:
**Descripción de la empresa**  

Syngenta es un líder mundial en innovación agrícola con presencia en más de 90 países. Nos enfocamos en desarrollar tecnologías y prácticas agrícolas que empoderen a los agricultores para alimentar a la población mundial mientras preservan nuestro planeta. Nuestros descubrimientos científicos ofrecen mejores beneficios para los agricultores y la sociedad a una escala sin precedentes. Guiados por nuestras Prioridades de Sostenibilidad, desarrollamos nuevas tecnologías y soluciones que ayudan a los agricultores a cultivar plantas más saludables en suelos más sanos con un mayor rendimiento. Syngenta Crop Protection tiene su sede en Basilea, Suiza; Syngenta Seeds en Estados Unidos. Lee nuestras historias y síguenos en LinkedIn, Instagram \& X.

 **Descripción del empleo**  

En Syngenta, nuestro objetivo es construir el equipo más colaborativo y confiable en agricultura, proporcionando semillas de alta calidad y soluciones innovadoras de protección de cultivos que mejoren el éxito de los agricultores. Para apoyar esta misión, el Trialing Latam de Syngenta está buscando un *Trialing Associate* para el Oeste de la Provincia de Buenos Aires y la Pampa*.* Este rol apoyará en la gestión y coordinación de ensayos a campo, selección y manejo de lotes experimentales, así como del relacionamiento con cooperadores y la gestión de datos agronómicos.

**Responsabilidades principales:**

* Búsqueda y relacionamiento con cooperadores (productores) para realizar ensayos a campo.
* Análisis y selección de lotes mediante tecnología satelital (NDVI\-Cropwise)
* Soporte en la planificación y optimización de recursos e insumos zonales.
* Soporte técnico durante actividades de siembra\-cosecha de ensayos.
* Manejo agronómico de lotes (plagas, malezas) y toma de decisiones de control.
* Gestión de protocolos y captura de datos a campo.
* Comunicación efectiva con stakeholders (Breeding\-PPS\&A).

 **Requisitos** **Requisitos indispensables:**

* Ingeniero/a Agrónomo/a
* Experiencia en cultivos extensivos: girasol y maíz.
* Experiencia en procesos de trialing.
* Dominio de herramientas informáticas: Paquete Office y Google Earth
* Conocimiento de la zona de Oeste de la Provincia de Buenos Aires y la Pampa
* Carnet de conducir vigente.
* Disponibilidad para viajar.

**Requisitos deseables:**

  

* Conocimientos en agricultura digital y nuevas tecnologías agrícolas
* Capacidad de planificación y organización, flexibilidad.
* Habilidades de comunicación y negociación
* Orientación a resultados
* Autonomía en la toma de decisiones
* Capacidad de análisis y resolución de problemas

  

**Información adicional**  

Más allá de solamente creer en el poder de la diversidad, Syngenta promueve una cultura inclusiva que abraza las diferencias en todas sus formas. Aquí creemos que el sentimiento de pertenencia permite que las personas sean las mejores versiones de sí mismas, construyendo un ambiente más agradable y productivo.


Todos los candidatos calificados serán considerados para nuestras posiciones, sin distinción de raza, género, edad, nacionalidad o discapacidad.

* Esta posición requiere disponibilidad laboral inmediata.
* Esta posición no incluye apoyo de relocación.

**Forma parte de una empresa líder que da vida al potencial de las plantas**


\#Remoto

title: Developer Java SR
description:
**Calling all innovators – find your future at Fiserv.**


We’re Fiserv, a global leader in Fintech and payments, and we move money and information in a way that moves the world. We connect financial institutions, corporations, merchants, and consumers to one another millions of times a day – quickly, reliably, and securely. Any time you swipe your credit card, pay through a mobile app, or withdraw money from the bank, we’re involved. If you want to make an impact on a global scale, come make a difference at Fiserv.

**Job Title**


Developer Java SR
Buscamos un Analista/desarrollador de Java con experiencia en la creación de aplicaciones de grado empresarial, escalables y de alto rendimiento.


Formarás parte de un talentoso equipo de software que trabaja en aplicaciones de misión crítica. Entre los deberes y las responsabilidades del desarrollador Java se incluyen gestionar el desarrollo de aplicaciones Java/Java EE y ofrecer sus conocimientos en todo el ciclo de vida de desarrollo de software, desde el concepto y el diseño a las pruebas.


Entre las responsabilidades del desarrollador Java se incluyen diseñar, desarrollar y entregar aplicaciones de baja latencia y alto volumen para sistemas de misión crítica.


Se requieren 5 años de experiencia en el cargo.

**Responsabilidades:**

* Diseño y desarrollo de aplicaciones de baja latencia y alto volumen para sistemas de misión crítica con una alta disponibilidad y rendimiento.
* Contribuir en todas las fases del ciclo de vida de desarrollo
* Escribir código eficiente, bien diseñado y que se pueda probar
* Asegurar que los diseños cumplen las especificaciones
* Preparar y producir las versiones de los componentes del software
* Ayudar en la mejora continúa investigando alternativas y tecnologías y presentándolas para su revisión por parte del equipo de arquitectura
* Identificar y analizar los requisitos de los usuarios
* Priorizar, asignar y realizar tareas en todo el ciclo de vida de desarrollo del software
* Revisar, probar y depurar el código de los miembros del equipo
* Planificar el lanzamiento de versiones de los productos con los equipos internos
* Documentar las fases de desarrollo
* Garantizar que nuestras aplicaciones sean seguras y estén actualizadas

**Requisitos:**

* Grado en ciencias informáticas, ingeniería o en una materia relacionada
* Experiencia práctica demostrada en el desarrollo de software
* Experiencia laboral demostrada en desarrollo de Java
* Experiencia práctica en el diseño y desarrollo de aplicaciones usando plataformas Java EE
* Análisis orientado al objeto y diseño utilizando los patrones de diseño habituales
* Muy buen conocimiento de los elementos internos de J2EE, J2ME y Java (carga de clases, gestión de memorias, gestión de transacciones, etc.)
* Excelentes conocimientos de bases de datos relacionales y tecnologías SQL y My SQL, Oracle, DB2, MariaDB, etc
* Experiencia en Spring Framework
* Experiencia en desarrollo de APIs Rest
* Experiencia como desarrollador Java certificado por Sun
* Experiencia en el desarrollo de aplicaciones web utilizando al menos un framework web popular (JSF, Wicket, GWT, Spring MVC)
* Experiencia en el desarrollo de software guiado por pruebas (TDD y/o BDD)


Thank you for considering employment with Fiserv. Please:

* Apply using your legal name
* Complete the step\-by\-step profile and attach your resume (either is acceptable, both are preferable).

**Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion:**


Fiserv is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other category protected by law.

**Note to agencies:**


Fiserv does not accept resume submissions from agencies outside of existing agreements. Please do not send resumes to Fiserv associates. Fiserv is not responsible for any fees associated with unsolicited resume submissions.

**Warning about fake job posts:**


Please be aware of fraudulent job postings that are not affiliated with Fiserv. Fraudulent job postings may be used by cyber criminals to target your personally identifiable information and/or to steal money or financial information. Any communications from a Fiserv representative will come from a legitimate Fiserv email address.

title: Student Marketeer, CABA
description:
Nuestros Red Bull Student Marketeers son parte del programa de embajadores de marca y producto más empoderado y dinámico del mundo. Ellos entienden a nuestro target y son responsables de manejar la imagen de la marca y el entendimiento del producto en sus universidades y área de influencia. Esto incluye el contacto directo con consumidores y clientes, invitándolos a probar el producto, además de trabajar en eventos de Red Bull para asegurar que los consumidores vivan una experiencia inolvidable con la marca.

**SE UN EMBAJADOR DE LA MARCA Y PRODUCTO**

Aumenta la base de consumidores en los lugares y momentos adecuados, respondiendo de manera acertada a cualquiera de sus preguntas. Crea y ejecuta un plan personalizado e innovador en el campus, involucrando a los estudiantes y dando vida a la marca en tu universidad. Establece una sólida red de contactos, construyendo relaciones con personas clave. Comparte contenido unico de la marca a traves de tus redes sociales. Trabaja en eventos de Red Bull y eventos patrocinados para asegurar una experiencia de marca inolvidable para los consumidores.
   

  

**SE UN EXPERTO EN VENTAS**
 Construye relaciones con los gerentes locales de puntos de venta y asegúrate de que Red Bull esté disponible y visible para los consumidores. Colabora con el equipo de ventas para abrir nuevos puntos de distribución de Red Bull en tu campus y alrededores. Aprovecha los recursos relevantes del mundo Red Bull para mantener la marca siempre presente en los puntos de venta de tu area de influencia. Asegura una ejecución perfecta de acuerdo con los estándares definidos para cada punto de venta.
   

  

**EXCELENCIA EN EJECUCION**
 Demuestra excelencia en la ejecución y atención a los detalles en todas las áreas de tu rol. Comparte ideas y colabora con el equipo. Planea y reporta tus actividades a través de la plataforma definida, de manera puntual y precisa. Contribuye al desarrollo de contenidos unicos para las plataformas de Red Bull proporcionando información local, tendencias y oportunidades interesantes.
   

  

**Tus áreas de conocimiento y experiencia que más importan para este rol:**

* Excelentes habilidades de comunicación.
* Personalidad carismática, enérgica, positiva y extrovertida.

* Capacidad para conciliar el trabajo a tiempo parcial y los estudios.
* Afinidad y deseo de aprender y aplicar nuevas habilidades, especialmente en marketing y ventas.

title: Ejecutivo/a de Territorio
Analyst, Content Analytics
description:
**BUILD SOMETHING BIGGER THAN YOURSELF**
 The Walt Disney Company, together with its subsidiaries and affiliates, is a leading diversified international family entertainment and media enterprise with the following business segments: Disney Entertainment, ESPN, Disney Parks, and Experiences and Products. From humble beginnings as a cartoon studio in the 1920s to its preeminent name in the entertainment industry today, Disney proudly continues its legacy of creating world\-class stories and experiences for every member of the family. Disney’s stories, characters and experiences reach consumers and guests from every corner of the globe. With operations in more than 40 countries, our employees and cast members work together to create entertainment experiences that are both universally and locally cherished.
   

  

**How will you contribute to our magical experience?**
 The Analyst, Content Analytics will play a pivotal role in transforming raw data into strategic insights that will shape the future of our content and audience experience on Disney Streaming platforms.
   

  

 This role will not just report on performance, but will proactively dive deep into consumption patterns, apply statistical and Machine Learning models to predict trends, and partner directly with stakeholders to influence content at a regional level, uncovering the hidden stories in our data and translate them into actionable recommendations that drive engagement, retention, and business growth.
   

  

**The Analyst, Content Analytics will be responsible for:**
* Create and maintain automated dashboards and reports in BI tools (like Looker) that empower stakeholders to monitor KPIs and explore data independently.
* Work with massive datasets using SQL to extract, transform, and analyze information from various sources. Propose improvements to data ingestion and structure to enable more efficient and robust analyses.
* Design and execute complex analyses to deeply understand the content lifecycle, performance, acquisition and engagement. Apply statistical and Machine Learning techniques to develop models that anticipate consumer behavior and content performance.
* Design and analyze the results of tests and other experiments to validate hypotheses about content and platform features. Stay current on the latest trends in data analytics, Machine Learning, and the entertainment industry.
* Collaborate closely with Content, Marketing and Finance teams to identify key challenges and growth opportunities. Translate business questions into concrete data hypotheses and analyses, presenting results in a clear and compelling manner.


**What we need from you to be part of this story:**
* \+2 years of experience in data analysis, data science, or business intelligence roles, ideally in media, entertainment or tech industries.
* Bachelor’s degree in quantitative fields like Economics, Actuarial Science, Engineering, Statistics, or Computer Science, ideally with a postgraduate degree or specialized courses in Data Science, Business Analytics, or Machine Learning.
* Demonstrable and solid experience using data visualization tools like Looker, Tableau, or Power BI to create interactive dashboards and reports. Proficiency in the Microsoft Office / Google Workspace suite, especially Excel / Google Sheets for ad\-hoc analysis.
* Mastery of analytics and BI tools.
* Advanced, proven experience with SQL for querying and manipulating large datasets in environments like Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, etc.
* Programming experience with Python or R for data analysis, including libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Scikit\-learn, Matplotlib/Seaborn.
* Knowledge of statistical and Machine Learning models (e.g., regression, classification, clustering, time series) to solve business problems.
* Experience analyzing digital media consumption metrics, subscription models (SVOD), or advertising models (AVOD) is a plus.
* Strategic and Analytical Thinking: The ability to go beyond surface\-level data, connect the dots, and generate insights that drive business decisions.
* Detail\-Oriented with Analytical Rigor: Precision and accuracy in handling data, ensuring the validity and reliability of results.


**Additional Information:**
 At Disney, we believe it takes great people to create the memorable experiences, products and services our consumers know and love. We are a team of storytellers and hire under equal opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, disability and gender identity. We foster a corporate culture of belonging and inclusiveness, which empowers our staff and company to thrive. At Disney, everyone has the opportunity to speak up and participate, grow and share ideas.
   

  

*“You can design and create, and build the most wonderful place in the world. But it takes people to make the dream a reality.”* 
*Walt Disney*

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
**📍 Location:** 
 Greater Buenos Aires (Hybrid)
 



**👥 Team:** 
 Customer Success
 



**🧭 Reports To:** 
 Customer Success Manager (CSM)
 



  





 🚀
 **Role Overview** 




 Our client is seeking an
 **Implementation \& Onboarding Manager** 
 to lead the critical early phase of their customers’ journey — from contract signing through the first 90 days. This role ensures every new customer experiences a seamless onboarding, realizes early value, and is set up for long\-term success within the broader Customer Success organization.
 



 This is
 **not a technical role** 
 . The Implementation \& Onboarding Manager acts as a
 **Customer Success Manager dedicated to the kickoff phase** 
 , focusing on onboarding, training, and relationship management. You’ll collaborate closely with internal teams — particularly the
 **Solutions Consultant** 
 , who owns the technical setup and integrations — to ensure smooth delivery and adoption.
 



 Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction, product adoption, and long\-term retention, making this a high\-visibility, cross\-functional position within the company.
 



  





 🎯
 **Key Responsibilities** 



* **Own the first 90 days** 
 of the customer lifecycle — from kickoff to successful handoff to the ongoing CSM.
* **Lead kickoff sessions** 
 to align on customer goals, success criteria, timelines, and communication cadence.
* **Design and execute onboarding plans** 
 that ensure a smooth implementation and early product adoption.
* **Deliver hands\-on training and enablement**

* **Coordinate cross\-functionally** 
 with Solutions Consultants, Product, Engineering, and Support teams to remove blockers and ensure progress.
* **Monitor key onboarding metrics** 
 such as time\-to\-first\-value, setup completion, and feature adoption.
* **Identify and mitigate risks** 
 early in the onboarding process to keep projects on track.
* **Gather and communicate customer feedback** 
 to drive continuous improvement of product and internal processes.
* **Maintain proactive communication** 
 with customers and internal teams throughout the implementation.
* **Transition customers smoothly** 
 to the long\-term Customer Success Manager, providing full documentation and context.
* **Continuously enhance onboarding processes** 
 and playbooks to increase efficiency and scalability.

* **High visibility:**

* **Scalable impact:** 
 the processes you create will shape the company’s customer experience at scale.
* **Cross\-functional collaboration:** 
 you’ll work with Product, Engineering, Support, and Sales teams in a fast\-growing SaaS environment.
* **Strategic influence:** 
 you’ll help shape how new customers experience the product from day one.



  





 🔍
 **What We’re Looking For** 



* **3–5 years of experience** 
 in
 **Customer Success, Implementation, or Account Management** 
 within
 **SaaS (B2B or product\-based)** 
 companies.
* Proven ability to manage multiple onboardings simultaneously in a fast\-paced environment.
* Strong communication and relationship\-building skills with both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Excellent organizational and project management abilities.
* Familiarity with
 **Salesforce** 
 is a plus, though not required.
* Analytical mindset with experience tracking onboarding metrics and customer success KPIs.
* Fluent English, both written and spoken.



  





 💫
 **Why You’ll Enjoy Working Here** 




 You’ll be part of a growing SaaS company where collaboration, ownership, and customer focus are at the core of everything we do. If you’re passionate about delivering exceptional onboarding experiences, driving customer value, and creating scalable processes that make a lasting impact — this role is for you.

Su objetivo principal es proporcionar análisis financieros profundos y relevantes, así como asesorar a los líderes en la toma de decisiones estratégicas, asegurando que los objetivos financieros estén alineados con la visión general de la empresa. A través del control de gestión del P\&L y del Cashflow, será fundamental en la identificación de oportunidades y riesgos financieros, contribuyendo así a optimizar el rendimiento y fomentando la innovación y el desarrollo de nuevos proyectos. Su rol implica colaborar con diversas áreas para asegurar una comunicación efectiva y un enfoque integral en la estrategia financiera del negocio.
   

  

* Supervisar y analizar el P\&L, asegurando la precisión de la información financiera e identificando desvíos vs el plan. Sugerir planes de acción para mitigar riesgos y potenciar oportunidades.
* Liderar el proceso de planfiicación estratégica, actuando como Business Partner del negocio, tanto para P\&L, Cashflow como HC y reportería requerida.
* Desarrollar reportes de gestión periódicos que resuman la situación financiera y operativa de la unidad de negocio y de cada uno de los productos.
* Elaboración de informes y presentaciones respecto a la performance del mes, tanto para el management como DH.
* Evaluar proyectos de inversión y oportunidades de negocio, proporcionando recomendaciones basadas en datos financieros.
* Facilitar la comunicación entre Finanzas y las diferentes áreas de negocio para asegurar alinear los objetivos financieros con las metas y objetivos estratégicos de cada producto.
* Servir como Business Partner, tanto para Financial Services como para Fraude y Payments.
* Definición a nivel contable y de controlling respecto a las diversas líneas de negocios y su medición y reportería financiera correspondiente.


**Requisitos**
* Pofesionales de carreras como Ingeniería, Economía, Administración o carreras afines. Se valora Postgrado o especialización en Finanzas.
* Dominio avanzado de Excel (modelado y análisis de datos) y amplio conocimientos en manejo de datos.
* Dominio avanzado del idioma inglés.
* Sera un plus contar con experiencia previa en Fintech

description:
Pedidosya es parte de Delivery Hero, compañía líder mundial en delivery que opera en más de 70 países en todo el mundo. La compañía, que opera en 15 países de Latinoamérica lanzó en 2020 PedidosYa Market, el primer mercado 100% digital que entrega alimentos y artículos para el hogar desde los 10 minutos tras haber realizado el pedido. Delivery Hero cotiza en la Bolsa de Frankfurt desde 2017 y forma parte del índice bursátil MDAX.

title: Lawyer 1
description:
ExxonMobil Business Support Center Argentina S.R.L empresa afiliada a Exxon Mobil Corporation (\*)
   

  

 More about us
   

  

 ExxonMobil, one of the world’s largest publicly traded energy companies, develops and applies innovation and next\-generation technologies to help safely and responsibly meet the world’s growing needs for energy, while improving living standards around the globe.
   

  

 As an industry leader, we operate facilities or market products in most of the world’s countries and explore for oil and natural gas on every continent.
   

  

 ExxonMobil has been present in Argentina for more than 100 years. The Global Business Center (GBC) in Buenos Aires has a workforce of more than 2,600 employees and provides support to an extensive portfolio of businesses across the globe.
   

  

 Our strong culture defines us: we build dynamic, inclusive teams where you will collaborate, innovate, and problem solve to deliver results. You will have the opportunity to think beyond traditional frames of reference, work with multicultural global teams and reach your full potential.
   

  

 What role will you play in our team
   

  

 The attorney will provide legal support for clients located in United States, Argentina, and other countries, on a wide variety of transactional, commercial, regulatory and operational matters, including but not limited to the negotiation, drafting and implementation of agreements, supporting a wide variety of commercial transactions and operations of our affiliates. The attorney will work in close relationship with assigned clients, often on teams organized by those clients, with oversight from more experienced attorneys where required. The attorney will handle a variety of matters and work independently with supervision that is appropriate for the attorney’s level of experience.
   

  

 What will you do
   

  

* Provide day\-to\-day legal support for ExxonMobil business units, developing relationships with key business leaders to drive positive business results.
* Support and lead a wide range of commercial transactions and draft, review and negotiate commercial agreements, including goods and services contracts and represent ExxonMobil affiliates in dealings, including negotiations, with third parties such as governments, competitors, partners, suppliers and equipment manufacturers
* Conduct and coordinate research into a variety of legal issues, provide legal analysis and counsel in order to maintain compliance with laws, regulations and internal policies and to anticipate and mitigate legal risks and exposures for the Corporation and its affiliates
* Assist in the preparation and presentation of materials in various settings, such as training sessions for clients on contracting, compliance and other legal issues
* Work closely with other teams within the ExxonMobil Law Department and other ExxonMobil functional groups (e.g., tax, regulatory, and finance functions).


**About You**
* Law Degree
* Licensed to practice law in Argentina
* Excellent English Level
* Strong writing skills, interpersonal and communication skills
* Minimum of three (3\) years of relevant work experience in english in a law firm or corporation, including experience in handling legal issues in transactions and commercial negotiations
* High ethical standards and integrity
* Strong analytical skills and ability to exercise sound business judgment


**Benefits**
**An ExxonMobil career is one designed to last. Our commitment to you runs deep: our employees grow personally and professionally, with benefits built on our core categories of health, security, finance, and life.**
**We offer you:**
* Competitive health coverage
* Flexible working hours
* 3 week vacation up to 5 years of service plus 1 personal day
* Online training tools
* Gym discounts and activities for sport and general well\-being
* A solid ergonomics program
* Free vaccination campaigns
* Medical assistance available in the offices
* Equipped maternity rooms
* Among others.


 More information on our Company’s benefits can be found here
   

  

 Please note benefits may be changed from time to time without notice, subject to applicable law.

description:

 En ICBC, trabajamos para potenciar el talento de nuestra gente, innovamos para evolucionar, promoviendo un ambiente de trabajo colaborativo y la mejor experiencia para nuestros clientes y equipos
 



 Buscamos personas que vibren nuestra cultura y nuestro propósito 🙌, con ganas de sumar, de aportar, de animarse, ¡de intentar! 💪 de crear desde la diversidad de miradas, que nos potencia y enriquece. Que nos acompañes y seas parte de la transformación de nuestra banca 💫, aportando tu perspectiva creativa, ¡innovadora! 💥
 



  





  





 En esta oportunidad buscamos
 **Auditor/a Sr** 
 para sumarse a nuestro equipo!
 



  





 Te contamos los objetivos principales de este rol:
 



  





  Proveer aseguramiento sobre el control interno, mediante el análisis de riesgos inherentes y de proceso, como así también de los controles implementados para gestionarlos.
 



  Concluir sobre la eficacia de los controles clave identificados.
 



  Detectar debilidades de control interno, oportunidades de eficiencia operativa e incumplimientos a políticas, códigos, normas y procedimientos.

description:
**About The Role**
 As a Support Agent, you will play a key role in delivering exceptional customer experiences through email, chat, and phone support. You will be a valued member of the IOA team and assist users with varying levels of technical expertise and contribute to a dynamic team supporting the Client Ads Product. Your ability to solve problems, communicate clearly, and adapt to a fast\-paced environment will be essential to your success.

* Ensure customer satisfaction by providing professional and empathetic support.
* Manage deadlines and multitask effectively.
* Communicate with customers via outbound calls and email.
* Follow all procedures, guidelines, and policies consistently.
* Document all relevant information from customer interactions.
* Maintain a positive attitude toward customers and teammates.
* Adapt quickly to shifting priorities and a dynamic operational pace.


**Work model**
 We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 4 days a week in Cognizant office in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
   

  

 The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.

* Basic knowledge of tools like Sheets, Slides, Docs, Chrome, Keep, Calendar, etc.
* Problem\-solving skills and critical thinking.
* Intermediate level of English (written and reading comprehension) is a plus.


**These will help you stand out**
* Experience supporting digital advertising platforms.
* Familiarity with Ads platforms or similar products.
* Ability to work independently and proactively.
* Strong customer empathy and patience.
* Experience in fast\-paced, high\-volume support environments.


**Benefits**
* A career in one of the largest and fastest growing IT services providers worldwide.
* Ongoing support and funding with training and development plans.
* Opportunity to work for leading global companies.
* Our work environment is diverse, collaborative and inclusive. We create conditions for everyone to thrive.
* A highly competitive salary and great benefits, such as OSDE for you and your primary family group, annual bonus, and many other benefits that we are going to share during the selection process.

title: ARG_SC Project Leader
description:
Country: Argentina
   

  

**ES EL MOMENTO**
 Santander (www.santander.com) está evolucionando de ser una
 **marca global de alto impacto** 
 a una organización
 **impulsada por la tecnología** 
 , y las personas están en el centro de este camino. Estamos liderando una
 **transformación centrada en el cliente** 
 que valora el
 **pensamiento disruptivo** 
 , la valentía de desafiar lo posible y la capacidad de
 **innovar** 
 .
   

  

 Esto es más que un cambio estratégico:
 **es una oportunidad para que las personas estén motivadas, crezcan, aprendan y generen un impacto real** 
 .
   

  

 Nuestra misión es contribuir a que más
 **personas y empresas prosperen** 
 . Adoptamos una sólida cultura de riesgos y esperamos que todas las personas, en toda la organización, asuman un enfoque proactivo y responsable en la gestión del riesgo.
   

  

 En Santander Argentina trabajamos para crear
 **una plataforma líder** 
 de servicios financieros, integrando lo mejor del mundo físico y digital. Somos un banco global con raíces locales, que
 **potencia** 
 la tecnología, la innovación y el talento para transformar la experiencia financiera.
   

  

**EL IMPACTO QUE GENERARÁS**
 Santander Consumer está buscando un/a
 **IT Manager (Vertical de Préstamos Prendarios)** 
 con base en CABA / AMBA.
   

  

 El propósito del rol es liderar la estrategia, ejecución y operación tecnológica asociada a los productos y procesos de la vertical.
   

  

 Su principal objetivo será garantizar la evolución, estabilidad y eficiencia de las soluciones que soportan el negocio de prendarios, asegurando la alineación entre las necesidades de las áreas de negocio y las capacidades tecnológicas del banco.
   

  

 Estamos redefiniendo nuestra forma de trabajar a través de la innovación, la tecnología de última generación, la colaboración y la libertad de explorar nuevas ideas.
   

  

 En este puesto, tus
 **principales responsabilidades** 
 incluirán:
   

  

* Liderar integralmente la vertical de Prendarios desde IT, gestionando la ejecución de proyectos, la operación y la evolución de las plataformas.
* Dirigir y desarrollar a los equipos a cargo, compuestos por Product Owners, Líderes Técnicos y Líderes de QA.
* Asegurar la priorización, planificación y entrega de iniciativas dentro de los plazos, calidad y presupuesto establecidos.
* Gestionar la relación con las áreas de Producto, Comercial, Riesgos, Operaciones y otras áreas clave, promoviendo la colaboración y el consenso en la toma de decisiones.
* Administrar y coordinar proveedores tecnológicos internos y externos, garantizando niveles adecuados de servicio y cumplimiento contractual.
* Participar en la definición de la estrategia tecnológica de la vertical, junto al Director de Sistemas y otros líderes de IT.
* Supervisar la gestión de incidentes, mantenimiento correctivo y evolutivo, y asegurar la continuidad operativa de las soluciones.
* Promover la adopción de buenas prácticas de desarrollo, testing, documentación y gestión ágil de proyectos.


**LO QUE APORTARÁS AL EQUIPO**
 Nuestra gente es nuestra mayor fortaleza. Cada persona contribuye con perspectivas únicas que nos hacen más fuertes como equipo y como organización. Valoramos quiénes son y potenciamos lo que aportan.
   

  

 Los siguientes
 **requisitos**

title: Store Manager - Bahía Blanca
description:
Pedidosya es parte de Delivery Hero, compañía líder mundial en delivery que opera en más de 70 países en todo el mundo. PedidosYa es la compañía de tecnología líder en delivery y quick commerce de Latinoamérica. Es una plataforma simple, rápida y accesible que conecta a una red de millones de personas usuarias, comercios y personas repartidoras a una gran variedad de productos y servicios que ofrece la comunidad. La compañía, que opera en 15 países de Latinoamérica lanzó en 2020 PedidosYa Market, el primer mercado 100% digital que entrega alimentos y artículos para el hogar desde los 10 minutos tras haber realizado el pedido. Delivery Hero cotiza en la Bolsa de Frankfurt desde 2017 y forma parte del índice bursátil MDAX.
   

  

**Somos un equipo con buena energía que se mueve rápido para generar impacto. Estamos siempre buscando personas que les gusten los desafíos, apasionadas por lo que hacen y sobre todo, que jueguen en equipo. ¿Te sumas?**
**El equipo de PedidosYa Market está creciendo y te buscamos a vos para que seas parte de uno de los negocios que más se ha expandido dentro de nuestra compañía. PedidosYa Market es el primer mercado 100% digital que entrega alimentos y artículos para el hogar desde los 10 minutos tras haber realizado el pedido y donde la experiencia de las personas usuarias es el foco y el éxito del negocio. Se trata de una cadena de locales, estratégicamente ubicados, cerrados al público y destinados solo a la venta online y la entrega por delivery.**
**Descripción del empleo**
**Tenemos una oportunidad para vos/ti (Elegir según país), estamos buscando Store Manager en nuestra tienda de Bahia Blanca.**
**¿Qué desafíos te esperan?**
* Liderar el correcto funcionamiento de la tienda asegurando el cumplimiento de los procesos administrativos y operativos, y la coordinación de los correspondientes equipos de trabajo.
* Delivery de órdenes: Asegurar la eficiencia operativa de los pickers (repositor/armador de pedidos) armando roles multitasking que maximicen el Utilization Rate (UTR) minimicen el fail rate y el picking time.
* Gestión de inventarios: Diseñar e implementar junto con el Operation Manager, los procesos que aseguren los niveles de stock e inventarios adecuados de la tienda.
* Pedido de reposición de mercadería: Asegurar el stock adecuado para la demanda de la tienda evaluando el inventario virtual, comparándolo con el físico y el input generado por el equipo de demand planning.
* Recepción de mercadería: asegurar que la recepción de mercadería esté alineada a los procesos y políticas de calidad de la compañía.
* Monitorear constantemente el proceso de fulfillment asegurando la capacidad de la tienda. Generar recomendaciones y mejoras en los procesos al Field Operations Coordinator que mejoren la productividad y la rentabilidad del store.
* Gestionar y controlar costos del presupuesto maximizando el Budget.
* Asegurar la implementación de acciones preventivas relacionadas a reducción de mermas, roturas, robos, etc.
* Asegurar el mantenimiento de todo el equipamiento de la tienda y controlar el correcto uso de la infraestructura.
* Supervisar y asegurar la correcta implementación de los estándares de higiene, seguridad y orden.
* Participar del proceso de cobro y entrega de órdenes a los riders.
* Asegurar el staff adecuado (liderar el recruiting) y la generación de la agenda de trabajo.
* Ser mentor de sus colaboradores y desarrollarlos profesionalmente.


**Requisitos**
**¿Qué esperamos de vos?**
* Experiencia mínima de 3 años liderando y desarrollando equipos.
* Experiencia de al menos 3 años en rubros de supermercado.
* Experiencia en prevención de pérdidas y manejo de mermas.
* Buscamos personas autónomas, curiosas, con ganas de aprender y fuerte orientación a resultados.
* Persistencia y disciplina en la resolución creativa de problemas en un entorno colaborativo y orientado al equipo.
* Destacadas habilidades interpersonales; capacidad para construir relaciones positivas y generar confianza.
* Capacidad para priorizar objetivos, identificar necesidades de recursos, desarrollar y comunicar casos de negocios y planes de implementación.


**Información adicional**
**PedidosYa te da la oportunidad de:**
* Crear valor para un gran ecosistema de negocio.
* Jugar en equipo, siempre: Pensar soluciones y construir colaborativamente, con buena energía.
* Moverte a la velocidad de tus ideas y emprender.
* Aprender, desarrollarte y reinventarte: Permitirte equivocarte, aprender haciendo, iterar y adaptarte a los cambios.
* Generar impacto positivo en las personas y el planeta.
* Trabajar de otra manera, en \#ModoPeYa: no importa el tiempo ni el lugar desde donde trabajas, lo que importa es la agilidad con la que tomas decisiones, la flexibilidad para adaptarte y los resultados que alcanzas en equipo.


**La diversidad de talento potencia nuestra Cooltura y nuestra organización. Jugamos en Equipo en todo lo que hacemos, y lo que más nos gusta de eso es que promovemos la creación de equipos diversos e inclusivos que puedan aportar diferentes perspectivas a PedidosYa. Nuestras oportunidades laborales están abiertas a todas las personas, independientemente de su identidad de género, orientación sexual, origen étnico, religión, edad, discapacidad y/o otras características individuales.**

title: Freelance Physicist with Python - AI Tutor
description:
***This opportunity is only for candidates currently residing in the specified country. Your location may affect eligibility and rates. Please submit your resume in English and indicate your level of English.***
 At Mindrift, innovation meets opportunity. We believe in using the power of collective intelligence to ethically shape the future of AI.
   

  

**What We Do**
 The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real\-world expertise from across the globe.
   

  

**About The Role**
 GenAI models are improving very quickly, and one of our goals is to make them capable of addressing specialized questions and achieving complex reasoning skills. If you join the platform as an AI Tutor in Physics, you'll have the opportunity to collaborate on these projects.
   

  

 Although every project is unique, you might typically:
   

  

* Generate prompts that challenge AI.
* Define comprehensive scoring criteria to evaluate the accuracy of the AI's answers.
* Correct the model's responses based on your domain\-specific knowledge


**How To Get Started**
 Simply apply to this post, qualify, and get the chance to contribute to projects aligned with your skills, on your own schedule. From creating training prompts to refining model responses, you'll help shape the future of AI while ensuring technology benefits everyone.
   

  

**Requirements**
* You hold a Bachelor's, Master's or PhD Degree in Physics and/or in relevant area.
* You have at least 3 years of professional experience with focus in one of the following fields: Astrophysics, Condensed Matter Physics, Electromagnetism and Photonics, High\-energy particle physics, Optics and Acoustics, General Physics, Quantum Mechanics, Relativistic Mechanics, Statistical Mechanics
* Your level of English is advanced (C1\) or above.
* Proficiency in Python, with experience using libraries such as NumPy, SciPy, and Pandas.
* Strong ability to design creative and diverse problems, particularly those that are computationally intensive and go beyond simple parameter modifications.
* You are ready to learn new methods, able to switch between tasks and topics quickly and sometimes work with challenging, complex guidelines.
* Our freelance role is fully remote so, you just need a laptop, internet connection, time available and enthusiasm to take on a challenge


**Benefits**
**Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?**
* Get paid for your expertise, with rates that can go up to $14/hour depending on your skills, experience, and project needs
* Take part in a part\-time, remote, freelance project that fits around your primary professional or academic commitments
* Work on advanced AI projects and gain valuable experience that enhances your portfolio
* Influence how future AI models understand and communicate in your field of expertise

At Uber for Business (U4B) we are customer\-obsessed, act like owners, make big ambitious bets and invest in our team so people can go from good to great, and from great to outstanding. title: Client Onboarding Associate
description:
**Job Description**
 J.P. Morgan, a global leader in financial services, offers strategic advice and products to top corporations, governments, and investors. We prioritize building trusted, long\-term partnerships to help clients achieve their goals. Our diverse workforce is key to our success, and we are committed to diversity and inclusion, ensuring equal opportunities for all, regardless of any protected attributes.
   

  

 As a Client Onboarding Associate within the Client Onboarding Team, you will have a client\-facing role, acting as a Project Manager for the implementation of JPMorgan products including bank accounts, payments and collections solutions, bank statements, etc. In this role, you will work closely with clients, Sales, Product, Operations, and Client Service to enhance global client satisfaction through seamless delivery of treasury solutions using robust tools and proven methodology, expert consultation, and client advocacy. Be seen as an innovative, passionate, and proactive partner in delivering a seamless end\-to\-end client experience. You must be able to coordinate multi\-disciplinary internal and client teams to understand client requirements and deliver the implementation of new business wins efficiently and on\-time; recognize issues and their severity, escalate to appropriate team members/functions, and own those that are appropriate. This role will handle multiple deals/projects concurrently that may have competing priorities, resources, and timelines. You must work independently with minimal supervision, as well as partner with the larger project deal team.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Host scoping meetings with the client to ensure product and technical requirements are understood and satisfied in accordance with the client's business and technical needs, as well as, the firm's capabilities
* Prepare Statement of Work outlining product implementation options and timeline
* Lead recurring project status meetings via conference call
* Use tracking tools and systems to document current project status, issues, and risks for all active projects
* Serve as an effective point of escalation on behalf of client
* Support client during production migration and production verification; coordinate with production teams to ensure all components are successfully migrated, and provide timely status updates to the client and project team


**Required Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**
* Fluent written and spoken in English language.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills to both clients and internal partners
* University degree (graduated or in progress)


**Preferred Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**
* Project Management experience
* Client facing experience
* Cash Management and Treasury knowledge


**About Us**
 J.P. Morgan is a global leader in financial services, providing strategic advice and products to the world’s most prominent corporations, governments, wealthy individuals and institutional investors. Our first\-class business in a first\-class way approach to serving clients drives everything we do. We strive to build trusted, long\-term partnerships to help our clients achieve their business objectives.
   

  

 We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicants’ and employees’ religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.
   

  

**About The Team**
 J.P. Morgan's Global Banking business is one of the largest wholesale banking client franchises in the world. We serve clients, including corporations, governments, states, municipalities, healthcare organizations, education institutions, banks and investors.
   

  

 Commercial Banking provides credit and financing, treasury and payment services, international banking and real estate services to clients—including corporations, municipalities, institutions, real estate investors and owners, and not\-for\-profit organizations.

title: Product Manager | Corporate Strategy
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Product
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 At Salesforce, we believe in bringing companies and customers together to drive meaningful impact. As the world’s \#1 AI CRM, we empower businesses of every size and industry to connect with their customers in a whole new way. Our culture is rooted in our core values — Trust, Customer Success, Innovation, Equality, and Sustainability — and our employees thrive in an environment where they can do the best work of their careers while making a difference in the world.
   

  

**Role**
 The Corporate Strategy \- Hyperscalers is looking for a Director, Product Management who gets immense satisfaction from seeing how their ideas accelerate progress and enable others to create outsized impact on the business. If you bring a strong sense of ownership, thrive on innovation, and want to be part of one of the fastest\-growing teams in the company, this opportunity is for you. In this role, you will have the chance to:
   

  

* Drive strategic initiatives that directly influence business growth.
* Collaborate across functions to solve complex challenges with cutting\-edge technology and best practices.
* Experiment, iterate, and innovate in a fast\-moving, customer\-focused environment. Contribute to Salesforce’s mission of building a future where technology helps everyone succeed.


 If you’re passionate about solving meaningful problems, shaping the future of business, and leaving a lasting impact, we’d love for you to join us.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Corporate Strategy Team is seeking a Senior Product Manager to drive the vision and execution of our Salesforce\-based commercial systems. In this role, you will focus on creating consistent, connected, and trusted experiences for both internal teams and external customers while ensuring cost efficiency and adoption across multiple touchpoints. You will own products that enable accurate estimation, customer adoption, and seamless integration across Sales\-led, Customer\-led, Product\-led, and Partner\-led initiatives.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and execute the product roadmap for Salesforce commercial systems.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including Sales, Customer Success, Product, and Engineering to deliver scalable solutions.
* Translate complex business requirements into clear product specifications and user experiences.
* Ensure solutions meet high standards of accuracy, adoption, and cost management.
* Monitor product performance, gather feedback, and iterate quickly to improve outcomes.
* Act as a thought leader for estimation and commercial systems, promoting best practices internally and externally.


**What You’ll Achieve**
* Commercial System Foundation: Build scalable and reliable systems to support commercial operations.
* Consistent Connected Experience: Ensure all touchpoints—internal and external—are cohesive and integrated.
* Customer Trust \& Cost Management: Enable transparent, accurate, and cost\-effective solutions that strengthen customer confidence.
* Customer Adoption \& Accuracy Validation: Drive adoption of estimation and operational tools while validating data and outcomes for reliability.


**Desired Skills**
* 4\+ years of Product Management experience, preferably in SaaS, CRM, or commercial systems.
* Strong understanding of Salesforce and its ecosystem.
* Proven ability to deliver complex products with cross\-functional impact.
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Analytical mindset with experience in estimation, metrics, and validation processes.
* Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC): Deep understanding of Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall methodologies.
* Customer\-centric with a passion for building trusted, usable, and scalable systems.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you require assistance due to a disability applying for open positions please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. title: Sales Lead, South Cone
description:
**About The Company**
 World is a network of real humans, built on privacy\-preserving proof\-of\-human technology, and powered by a globally inclusive financial network that enables the free flow of digital assets for all. It is built to connect, empower, and be owned by everyone.
   

  

**About World**
 World is a network of real humans, built on privacy\-preserving proof\-of\-personhood technology, and powered by a globally inclusive financial ecosystem. At the center of this effort are Orbs: biometric devices designed to verify uniqueness, and World ID: a secure, self\-custodial identity layer. Together, they create the foundation for a more human internet—and for unlocking access to everything from social platforms to economic opportunity.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The
 **Market Operations** 
 team oversees the launch strategy and deployment of Worldcoin across all markets. This group drives user adoption by managing partnerships, business development, and or distribution on the ground.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of
 **Sales, Operations** 
 , and
 **Go\-to\-Market execution** 
 in Argentina and collaborates closely with cross functional teams, to ensure global and local alignment and operational excellence.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for an entrepreneurial, execution\-focused
 **Leader** 
 to drive the growth of our commercial efforts in Argentina. This person will play a key role in two key go\-to\-market initiatives in Argentina —
 **Orbs for All** 
 (merchant\-hosted Orb deployments) and
 **World ID Rewards** 
 (merchant\-sponsored offers and loyalty campaigns for verified users). The ideal candidate combines sales leadership, operational rigor, and a deep understanding of how to scale distributed networks.
   

  

 You’ll be directly responsible for hitting merchant acquisition targets, leading a lean sales team (initially contractor\-based), and partnering cross\-functionally with Product, Device, Logistics and the broader Market Ops org to implement at speed while ensuring compliance and consistency.
   

  

 This is a
 **foundational role** 
 in one of World’s most strategic markets, and an opportunity to shape how Argentine’s experience and adopt our protocol.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Sales Strategy \& Execution**
* Own the end\-to\-end sales funnel for both merchant acquisition and retail development in Argentina, from sourcing, acquisition to activation.
* Build and execute local go\-to\-market strategies that align with broader Market Ops and Argentina specific milestones
* Leverage internal performance data and market insights to shape merchant targeting, incentive models, and campaign strategy.
* Prioritize merchant verticals (e.g. convenience, retail, cafés) and test offer structures that drive both user verifications and long\-term retention.


**Team Leadership**
* Recruit, onboard, and manage a team of field\-based, performance\-driven sales contractors.
* Define training, targets, and incentive structures to motivate results across acquisition, activation, and quality benchmarks.
* Foster a culture of resilience, transparency, and accountability across the org.


**Partner \& Stakeholder Management**
* Own key merchant relationships, especially anchor accounts and national chains.
* Collaborate closely with the Head of Market Ops South Cone to deliver on shared goals and ensure integrated execution across sales, Orb deployment, and World network operations.
* Serve as the commercial liaison with cross\-functional teams—including Product, Device, Logistics, and the broader Market Ops—to localize processes and execution.


**Operational Excellence**
* Track and report on KPIs including Orb installations, active merchant count, reward redemptions, location performance, and cost per Orb deployed.
* Ensure compliance with local legal and policy standards for merchant onboarding and user rewards.
* Design and implement scalable systems for merchant support, asset deployment, and deal performance monitoring.


**About You**
* You have 7\+ years of experience in sales, business development, or commercial operations—preferably in tech or high\-growth environments.
* You bring a sales agenda, driving results in a short period of time leveraging your sales network
* You’ve built and led high\-performing sales teams, ideally including external contractors or field reps.
* You have experience scaling distributed partner or merchant networks with clear funnel accountability.
* You’re data\-driven and strategic. You regularly use performance data, feedback loops, and local insight to fine\-tune execution, optimize funnels, and influence broader go\-to\-market strategy.
* You’re scrappy. You thrive in fast\-moving, ambiguous environments and know how to get things done across dotted\-line orgs.
* You have strong cross\-cultural competency and market fluency. You understand Argentine business norms, user behavior, and merchant dynamics, and you can navigate global\-local collaboration with ease.
* You are fluent in Spanish and English.
* You are mission\-aligned, with deep curiosity and belief in privacy\-preserving identity and decentralized systems.


**Nice to have**
* Experience scaling a merchant network or channel partner ecosystem.
* Experience in Web3, rewards/loyalty platforms, or identity systems.
* Familiarity with Argentine consumer behavior, offline retail, or regulatory environments.

title: Sales Operations and Salesforce Administrator (OTE $80,000/year USD), Sparkrock
description:
Are you passionate about Salesforce, automation, and leveraging AI to supercharge business workflows? Do you thrive at the intersection of technology, operations, and sales strategy?
   

  

 At Sparkrock, we help social benefit organizations—like nonprofits, school boards, and government agencies—reach their greatest potential through technology. Every day, over 150,000 people use our ERP and product platforms to work more efficiently, freeing up time and resources to focus on the good they want to achieve.
   

  

 We are seeking a Sales Operations and Salesforce/Certinia Admin to manage Salesforce and Certinia to support business requirements. This role also includes owning financial management system configuration and integrations with marketing, accounting, sales engagement, and document management platforms while ensuring data integrity and optimizing workflows. The manager will partner with Marketing, Finance, and Sales teams to track KPIs, improve forecasting, provide training, and explore AI\-driven automation opportunities to enhance sales and marketing efficiency.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll not only administer and support Salesforce but also be the key owner of Certinia (FinancialForce) configuration and operations. You’ll ensure that our revenue, billing, and forecasting processes are accurate and scalable, and you’ll have the opportunity to expand your expertise by working closely with Intacct and other critical integrations.
   

  

 If you’re someone who enjoys solving problems, improving efficiency, and enabling teams with better tools and insights, this is the perfect opportunity for you.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Salesforce Administration** 
 :
   

  

  

* Configure fields, objects, page layouts, and record types
* Build and maintain workflows, flows, validation rules, approval processes, and customizations
* Manage system security: roles, profiles, permission sets, sharing rules, OWDs
* Troubleshoot user issues, provide support, and deliver training/documentation


**Certinia Administration** 
 : Configuration and ongoing support of FinancialForce processes (billing, forecasting, revenue recognition).
   

  

**Systems Management** 
 : Monitor and maintain integrations, manage enhancements, and resolve issues (especially Certinia \& Intacct).
   

  

**Reporting \& Analytics** 
 : Build dashboards, forecasts, campaign attribution, pipeline tracking, and ROI analysis.
   

  

**Process Optimization** 
 : Document/refine sales processes, automate workflows, improve data quality.
   

  

**Strategic Collaboration** 
 : Partner with Sales Ops, Marketing, Finance, and Customer Success to ensure KPIs are accurate and actionable.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Information Systems, Computer Science, or equivalent experience
* At least 2 years of experience with direct Certinia/FinancialForce
* 3\-5 years of proven experience as a Salesforce Administrator
* Hands\-on expertise with Salesforce configuration and customization, including:
* Workflows, Flows, and Process Builder automations
* Validation rules, approval processes, and assignment rules
* Reports, dashboards, and list views
* Security configuration (profiles, roles, permission sets, OWD, sharing rules)
* Integration setup and troubleshooting with third\-party tools (HubSpot, Certinia, Intacct, etc.)
* Data management: imports, exports, deduplication, and maintaining data integrity
* Strong reporting/analytics skills (Salesforce Reports/Dashboards, Power BI a plus)
* Ability to work cross\-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Finance, and Customer Success
* Excellent problem\-solving skills with the ability to translate business requirements into system solutions
* Clear communicator, able to train and support users across functions


**Nice to have**
* Salesforce Administrator Certification(s)
* Hands\-on experience with Intacct (huge plus)
* Experience with Finance/ERP integrations (Certinia, Intacct, or similar)
* Exposure to AI tools, automation platforms, or agentic workflow technologies
* Familiarity with PandaDoc, Outreach, or Chorus
* Experience in SaaS or fast\-scaling tech companies


**Benefits**
 We don’t call them perks; they’re just part of what makes working at Sparkrock great. Below are a couple of highlights:
   

  

  

* We are 100% remote and global. Live your best life wherever that may be, and never lose out on career opportunities because of it
* Flexible work hours. We work asynchronously and don’t care when you’re online, just that you deliver great results and are there for our customers
* We are dedicated to your growth with consistent and meaningful feedback, support in achieving your personal career goals, and access to leading\-edge tools, playbooks, and technology to amplify your experience
* Introductions to thought leaders in the space and webinars on cutting\-edge tech hot topics
* Stipend to help set up your ideal home office
* Focus on culture: coffee chats, happy hours, cooking classes, book clubs, and more!


 We strive to build a team that reflects the diversity of the community we work in and encourage applications from traditionally underrepresented groups such as women, visible minorities, Indigenous peoples, people identifying as LGBTQ2SI, veterans, and people with disabilities.
   

  

 Sparkrock uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools as part of our candidate screening and selection process to help identify applicants whose experience and qualifications best align with the role. All hiring decisions are made by people. All open roles are for existing vacancies unless otherwise communicated to the candidate. We are committed to keeping candidates informed throughout the process and will notify all interviewed applicants of our hiring decision within 45 days of their interview. Sparkrock retains all job postings and related recruitment information for a minimum of three years.

title: POS Indirect Supervisor
description:
Your Tasks
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 Ensure that each indirect point of sale is properly classified and stocked according to its sales potential, customer profile, and coverage strategy, achieving optimal assortment and "perfect store" targets on a sustained basis.
   

  

**Main Accountabilities**
* Field immersion: Do structured trade visits to verify retail context and collect information / insights about execution, trends, and competitors Focus on TOP STORE o TOP Indirect Customers
* Propose adjustments to the route and frequency of visits based on the cluster and the potential of each POS
* Management and Maintenance of the POS Database
* Manage and monitor in in\-store execution by maintaining KPI tracking tools and developing reports. Reports: include TRAX and MSL (Execution KPIs such as % compliance of second displays, share of shelf, primary exhibition POS materials, and MSL compliance) and valorization of opportunities
* Verify that the points of sale are correctly assigned to the corresponding cluster based on volume, customer type, and location
* Update data for indirect points of sale: geolocation, customer profile, channel type, product mix, etc.
* Performance Analysis by Cluster
* Analyze the performance of the POS according to the assigned cluster (MSL, availability, assortment, facings, shelf share)
* Identify gaps between theoretical cluster vs. actual behavior
* Collaboration with Commercial Teams and Distributors
* Ensure proper POS execution according to ad hoc campaigns


 Your Profile
   

  

**Skills**
**Knowledge, Skills, and Experience**
* Hold a relevant professional degree or its equivalent.
* Show proficiency in digital tools, especially Power BI, to facilitate data manipulation and visualization.
* Exemplify advanced Excel capabilities, essential for robust data management and performance reporting.
* Having exposure to the pharmacy channel will serve as a strong asset in your contextual understanding of our business landscape.
* Be ready to travel, committing to approximately two provincial trips each month to effectively manage relationships and insights.
* Possess personal transportation (a car) to ensure mobility in fulfilling your role.
* Bring forth 3 to 5 years of solid experience in sales or trade marketing, particularly focusing on point of sales initiatives.

title: Especialista en Control de Gestión
description:
**Nueva oportunidad en el CFI:** 
 Estamos buscando un/a
 **Especialista en Control de Gestión**

 **Área de Unidad de Planificación y Control de Gestión**
