 Buscamos una persona con experiencia y motivación para contribuir al diseño, implementación y monitoreo de estrategias de control de gestión y desarrollo regional, mediante el análisis y sistematización de información económica, productiva y logística de las provincias. 
 



  





 El puesto tiene como propósito elaborar tableros de control, reportes analíticos e indicadores de desempeño que fortalezcan la toma de decisiones estratégicas del organismo, integrando fuentes de información y optimizando procesos de seguimiento y control. 
 



  





**Principales responsabilidades** 

  
 



* Sistematizar y mantener actualizada la base de datos sobre la estructura productiva y logística de las provincias.
* Diseñar, actualizar y gestionar tableros dinámicos de control en Power BI y otras herramientas de Business Intelligence.
* Articular con consultores externos el desarrollo de herramientas tecnológicas (mapas interactivos, tableros, repositorios de datos).
* Elaborar fichas de desempeño logístico provincial en el marco del Proyecto de Estrategias Logísticas Regionales.
* Participar en proyectos institucionales vinculados a acción sustentable, acción energética y desarrollo de proyectos.
* Preparar informes técnicos y presentaciones ejecutivas para autoridades, provincias y organismos vinculados.
* Representar al CFI en reuniones técnicas y eventos institucionales, difundiendo resultados y avances.



  
 



**Requisitos excluyentes** 

  
 



* Título universitario de grado correspondiente a carreras de duración no inferior a cuatro
 
 (4\) años.
* Experiencia laboral no inferior a SEIS (6\) años en funciones afines, en organismos públicos, organismos internacionales, cámaras empresariales o consultoría en desarrollo económico/productivo.



  
 



  





**Requisitos deseables** 

  
 




  




* Formación en
 **Economía, Ingeniería Industrial, Ingeniería Eléctrica, Ingeniería Ambiental o afines** 
 .
* Posgrado en administración, gestión de proyectos, inteligencia de negocios o comercio exterior.
* Dominio avanzado de
 **Power BI** 
 y herramientas de Business Intelligence (Qlik Sense, Tableau, Pentaho, etc.).
* Conocimientos en
 **SQL, MySQL** 
 y bases de datos relacionales.
* Capacidad de análisis de datos, modelización y elaboración de indicadores.
* Manejo de herramientas de gestión de proyectos (Trello, Asana u otros).
* Nociones de programación (HTML, PHP, Matlab).
* Idiomas: inglés intermedio y portugués intermedio\-avanzado (valorable).



  
 



  





**Competencias y habilidades requeridas** 

  
 




  




* Visión estratégica y territorial:
 
 Capacidad para comprender, anticipar y articular las dinámicas económicas, sociales, políticas y ambientales que inciden en el desarrollo del país, integrando una mirada estratégica de largo plazo con un conocimiento profundo de las realidades, potencialidades y desafíos de los distintos territorios.



  
 


* Análisis y síntesis de información compleja:
 
 Capacidad para identificar, recopilar, interpretar y relacionar información proveniente de múltiples fuentes —técnicas, normativas, territoriales o institucionales— con el fin de elaborar diagnósticos, informes y propuestas que contribuyan a la toma de decisiones informadas.



  
 


* Comunicación efectiva:
 
 Habilidad para expresar información de manera clara y precisa, tanto en la redacción de documentos como en la comunicación oral, mostrando capacidad de escucha y facilitando acuerdos que promuevan un clima laboral colaborativo y orientado a resultados.



  
 


* Capacidad de articulación interinstitucional: H
 
 abilidad para establecer, mantener y fortalecer vínculos de cooperación y coordinación con otros organismos del Estado, entidades del sector privado, organizaciones de la sociedad civil y actores territoriales, con el fin de alcanzar objetivos comunes y optimizar recursos.



  
 


* Trabajo en equipo:
 
 Integración activa a los equipos de trabajo, colaborando con compañeras/os y áreas vinculadas, compartiendo información de manera constructiva y aportando al logro de objetivos comunes.



  
 


* Orientación a resultados:
 
 Capacidad para dirigir los esfuerzos propios y del equipo hacia el logro de los objetivos institucionales, priorizando la eficacia, la eficiencia y la calidad de los resultados. Implica actuar con sentido de responsabilidad pública, planificación y compromiso con los fines del organismo, asegurando que las acciones contribuyan al cumplimiento de metas concretas y al fortalecimiento del desarrollo federal.



  
 


* Innovación:
 
 Mantener una actitud abierta a la incorporación de nuevas herramientas, procesos y tecnologías, proponiendo ideas y prácticas que simplifiquen la gestión de datos, reduzcan tiempos administrativos y fortalezcan la calidad del servicio interno.



  





**Condiciones de trabajo** 

  
 




  




* Lugar de trabajo:
 **CABA**
* Modalidad:
 **presencial**
* Excelentes beneficios.



  Si te interesa esta oportunidad, envíanos tu CV a seleccion@cfi.org.ar con el asunto
 **“Postulación – Especialista III en Control de Gestión”** 
 . 
 



   
 



 Fecha límite para recibir postulaciones:
 **24/10/2025**

title: Salesforce Data Cloud Admin/Specialist
description:
**WHY DEPT®?**
 We are pioneers at heart. What this means, is that we are always leaning forward, thinking of what we can create tomorrow that does not exist today. We were born digital and we are a new model of agency, with a deep skillset in tech and marketing. That’s why we hire curious, self\-driven, talented people who never stop innovating.
   

  

 Our culture is big enough to cope and small enough to care. Meaning, that with people across 20\+ countries, we’re big enough to provide you with the best tools, global opportunities, and benefits that help you thrive. While acting small by investing in you, your growth, your team, and giving you the autonomy to solve our clients’ problems, no matter where you are in the world.
   

  

 We’re seeking a Salesforce Data Cloud Admin/Specialist to run day\-to\-day operations inside Data Cloud. You’ll manage ingestion jobs, harmonization, segmentation, and activation to ensure the platform delivers value across marketing, service, and analytics use cases.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Configure and maintain Salesforce Data Cloud ingestion jobs and data streams.
* Set up and monitor identity resolution rules, unification, and harmonization processes to deliver a trusted single customer profile.
* Create and manage audience segments for activation across Marketing Cloud, Service Cloud, Commerce Cloud, and external channels.
* Build calculated insights to support reporting, personalization, and campaign logic.
* Partner with CRM/Marketing teams to translate business requirements into Data Cloud segments and activations.
* Troubleshoot ingestion errors, segment mismatches, and activation job failures.
* Stay up to date on Salesforce Data Cloud features, governance practices, and new capabilities.


**Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of Salesforce administration or CDP operations experience; hands\-on Data Cloud experience required.
* Strong knowledge of Data Cloud objects (Data Lake Objects, Unified Profiles, Calculated Insights, Segments, Data Streams).
* Familiarity with Salesforce Marketing Cloud or Service Cloud activation paths.
* Basic SQL and troubleshooting skills for calculated insights.
* Salesforce certifications (Data Cloud Consultant, Administrator) preferred.
* Strong communication skills for collaborating with business stakeholders and technical teams.

title: Product Manager – Estimation and Cost Management Experience (Release Focus) – Corporate Strategy
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Product
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 Salesforce is seeking an innovative, strategic, and execution\-oriented Product Manager with Release Management expertise to join our Corporate Strategy team. This is a unique opportunity to own both the vision and delivery of Salesforce\-based commercial systems, with a focus on estimation and cost management experiences that directly influence business growth.
   

  

 At Salesforce, we bring companies and customers together to drive meaningful impact. As the world’s \#1 AI CRM, we empower businesses of every size to connect with their customers in transformative ways. Our culture is grounded in our core values — Trust, Customer Success, Innovation, Equality, and Sustainability — and we thrive in an environment where employees can do the best work of their careers while making a difference.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Product Manager – Release Focus, you will lead the strategy, roadmap, and execution for Salesforce commercial systems within the Estimation and Cost Management experience. You will partner with engineering, design, QA, and cross\-functional stakeholders to ensure that new features are thoughtfully designed, delivered reliably, and adopted effectively.
   

  

 This role blends product ownership with release management, giving you the opportunity to shape solutions that drive measurable business impact while ensuring smooth, predictable deployments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
****Product Management:****
* Define and prioritize the roadmap for Estimation and Cost Management experiences in alignment with business objectives.
* Gather requirements from stakeholders, customers, and internal teams to drive product strategy.
* Partner with UX, engineering, and analytics teams to design and validate solutions that meet user needs.
* Measure and analyze product adoption, impact, and performance to inform future iterations.


**Release Management**
* Plan, schedule, and coordinate Salesforce release cycles across internal and external systems.
* Ensure smooth deployments by working closely with Product Managers, Engineers, QA, and stakeholders.
* Develop and maintain release documentation, including rollout plans, risk assessments, and rollback procedures.
* Monitor post\-release performance, quickly identify issues, and drive resolution.
* Advocate for best practices in release management, change control, and communication.
* Support enablement and training for internal teams to maximize adoption and value realization.


**What You’ll Achieve**
* Reliable Releases: Deliver Salesforce releases on schedule, maintaining high quality and accuracy.
* Strategic Product Impact: Drive product decisions that improve estimation accuracy, business ROI, and user experience.
* Seamless Integration: Ensure deployments are coordinated across teams and systems for a connected experience.
* Customer \& Internal Trust: Maintain system integrity, reduce errors, and support accurate estimation and reporting.
* Efficient Adoption: Empower teams to adopt new features quickly and confidently.


**Desired Skills \& Experience**
* 3–5 years of experience in product management, release management, or a hybrid role, preferably in SaaS or enterprise platforms.
* Experience with Salesforce or similar CRM/enterprise systems is highly desirable.
* Strong project management, organizational, and communication skills.
* Experience with release management tools, CI/CD pipelines, and version control systems.
* Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC): Deep understanding of Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall methodologies.
* Detail\-oriented, proactive in identifying and mitigating risks, and able to balance strategic vision with execution.
* Collaborative mindset with demonstrated ability to influence cross\-functional teams.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you require assistance due to a disability applying for open positions please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.
